title: coryphantha clavata var. ancistracantha
intro: Coryphantha clavata var. ancistracantha, commonly known as the "Pincushion Cactus", is a rare and unique species of cactus. This plant is known for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The therapeutic actions of Coryphantha clavata var. ancistracantha include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic actions, making it a potential treatment for various skin conditions and infections. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.

side_effects: Coryphantha clavata var. ancistracantha can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal irritation, which may lead to symptoms like nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, it can also cause allergic reactions, including skin irritation and respiratory issues like asthma or bronchitis.
